holdings.infoBox: EWZ is an equity ETF with a total of 56 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vale S.A. stock at 11.28%, Nu Holdings at 8.40%, Itaú Unibanco Holding at 8.38%, Petróleo Brasileiro S.A. - Petrobras at 6.50%, and Petróleo Brasileiro S.A. - Petrobras at 6.20%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Brazil ETF (EWZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Brazil 25-50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of Brazilian firms covering the entire market-cap spectrum. EWZ was launched on Jul 10, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Cargill studies beef tallow for Brazil biodiesel as US tariffs bite
data.text: Cargill is studying the feasibility of using beef ​tallow to produce biodiesel in Brazil, a ‌trader for the firm said on Tuesday, as U.S. tariffs have made exports of ​the animal fat less attractive.
